JOURNAL OF SCIENCE, ART AND TECHNOLOGY (

JOSAT)

i

s a peer-reviewed academic journal published by the Faculty of Engineering and Architecture. The journal aims to support knowledge production, share scientific developments, and strengthen interdisciplinary interaction by publishing high-quality scientific studies in engineering, architecture,

interior architecture, environment

and related disciplines. JOSAT provides a platform for critical and multifaceted discussion of contemporary developments by featuring research at the intersection of science, art, and technology. In this context, it promotes the dissemination of current developments and encourages the sharing of original work in the scientific community by supporting research findings, applications, experiences, and knowledge exchange. The authors are responsible for the science, content, and language of the articles published in the journal. Innovative research articles covering all original and current scientific research and applications that have not been previously published elsewhere are accepted. In addition to academics, articles by expert researchers are also evaluated for the journal. The range of topics suitable for publication is broad, including but not limited to developments in computer engineering and software technologies, new computational methodologies, power systems, digital electronic systems, signal processing, communication systems, construction management, the design and development of industrial and service systems, and risk and uncertainty analysis in complex systems with various inputs.

In addition, architectural design studies in architectural field research include areas including, but not limited to, architectural education, computer-aided design, cinematic architecture, interior architecture, interior architecture and environmental design, architectural criticism, construction management, housing studies, accessibility, and sustainab

ility.
